title: INSERT OR IGNORE does not gracefully drop records violating UNIQUE constraints in version 1.4.0
description: ### What happens? The following script inserts two tuples containing duplicate values into a table with a `UNIQUE` constraint on the column the duplicates are inserted into. This statement will execute successfully in versions up to `1.3.2`, but now fails as of `1.4.0` with the error > Constraint Error: PRIMARY KEY or UNIQUE constraint violation: duplicate key "1" The previous behavior, as well as the behavior observed in other db engines such as postgres, would be that the first tuple `(1, 1)` would be inserted, and the second tuple which now violates the `UNIQUE` constraint `(2, 1)` would be "ignored". The same violation is raised if it is the `PRIMARY KEY` duplicated instead of the `UNIQUE` key (i.e. `VALUES (1, 1), (1, 2)`) I didn't see the change of behavior noted the release notes. ### To Reproduce ``` CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tbl (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, uniq INTEGER, UNIQUE(uniq)); INSERT OR IGNORE INTO tbl VALUES (1, 1), (2, 1); -- Also fails: --INSERT INTO tbl VALUES (1, 1), (2, 1) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; ``` ### OS: Mac Os ARM ### DuckDB Version: 1.4.0 ### DuckDB Client: cli ### Hardware: _No response_ ### Full Name: Stephen Williams ### Affiliation: AppOmni ### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build. I have tested with a stable release ### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue? Yes ### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue? - [x] Yes, I have ### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue? - [x] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tbl1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, uniq INTEGER, UNIQUE(uniq));
INSERT INTO tbl1 SELECT 2, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl1 WHERE uniq = 1);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tbl2 (id INTEGER, value TEXT, UNIQUE(value));
INSERT INTO tbl2 VALUES (1, 'duplicate') ON CONFLICT(value) DO NOTHING;
INSERT INTO tbl2 VALUES (2, 'duplicate') ON CONFLICT(value) DO NOTHING;
key_bug_features: INSERT OR IGNORE fails on UNIQUE constraint violations
